post.description: Upload one or more original files into a document set.

get.description: Read aggregate processing progress for an organization.
Inspect processing jobs, warnings, and related events for a document set.
Read intake and baseline status for one document set.
Read the organization project structure tree.
Read documents attached to a project structure node.
Read source document metadata and available actions.
Read proxied source document view/download URLs.
Proxy source document content after organization authorization.
Read dedicated source viewer data for PDF and XLSX documents.
Proxy one generated PDF rendered page after organization authorization.
Read placeholder typed document data for a document version.
